name: Flowermate WIX
summary: A small, low-cost concentrate pen with three heat settings and a ceramic coil, for patients prescribed wax or extracts who want a basic on-the-go option.
description: The Flowermate WIX is a concentrates-only pen built for simplicity and price. A pure ceramic heating coil offers three temperature settings, the atomiser is replaceable, and a 10-second pre-heat means it's ready almost immediately. The 510 thread and USB-C charging keep it flexible and easy to top up, and a zirconia mouthpiece keeps the draw cool. For a UK patient prescribed concentrates who wants a cheap, pocketable device for dosing on the move, the WIX does the job — the small 350mAh battery means it's best as a portable extra rather than a primary device.
